feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Tragedy of Bruce Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,878Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 1,478

Summary: After a devastating betrayal leaves Damian Wayne questioning everything he thought he knew about his family, Dick Grayson finds himself forced into a role he never expected: protector, advocate, and perhaps even father. As old wounds resurface and long-buried truths come to light, the Batfamily must confront not only what was done to Damian, but the patterns that have shaped all of their lives. Faced with impossible choices, they begin asking a question none of them ever dared consider before: What happens when the mission is no longer worth the cost?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Lights! Cameras! And ACTION!
entry.summary:
Author: Fishwithabow

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,183Chapters: 16/25Kudos: 179

Summary: You are Bruce’s Wayne only BLOOD daughter. He adopted you when you were nine following your mother’s sudden death. Your mother used to be a well known actor and so of course, like mother like daughter, you too wanted to be an actor. Your father and your new siblings for some reason tend to forget about you and end up leaving you in their dust. Will that ever change? Will you become famous before they ever notice you? Or will something happen that will change your whole view of your life? Also this is a crossover, you just don’t know it. CURRENTLY REVISING STORY!! NO NEW CHAPTERS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE!!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: Hyperobsessedfanficwriter

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,160Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 28

entry.title: Four times Bruce Wayne was an unemotional robot and one time Dick Grayson called him out on it
entry.summary:
Author: Miaahhh

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 277Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 10

Summary: Bruce’s white lenses narrow dangerously at him. He swallows.    Bruce is his dad. He isn’t scared of Bruce. That’d be stupid.   He sighs. “Was that a good enough mission report?”   Bruce hums. “It was good enough.” His gravelly voice echoes across the cave, and his footsteps do, too, as he walks to the bat computer.

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 227,983Chapters: 43/?Kudos: 406

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

entry.title: The Coastline Alibi
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,627Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 6

Summary: The Batfamily walks into a situation. Or rather, 𝘥𝘰𝘦𝘴𝘯'𝘵 walk into it—because Bruce and Salix are nowhere to be found. When Alfred finally tracks them down, the family receives photographic evidence that their patriarch and his best friend have committed the ultimate crime: enjoying a peaceful nap together.

entry.title: a body of things you did not bury
entry.summary:
Author: AdmirableOcelet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,266Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 6

Summary: "𝘐𝘧 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘥𝘰𝘯'𝘵 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘳𝘶𝘭𝘦 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘧𝘶𝘵𝘶𝘳𝘦 𝘴𝘦𝘭𝘧 𝘴𝘦𝘵𝘴 𝘰𝘶𝘵, 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘺 𝘥𝘪𝘥𝘯'𝘵 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘬𝘪𝘭𝘭?" The Batfamily gets an education in loopholes. Rook gets the last sandwich. Alfred does not approve of hypothetical body disposal in the rose garden. Bruce is off-world. His teenage past self eats all the sandwiches and explains, in exhaustive and deeply unsettling detail, exactly how he never broke a rule he didn't have. The Batfamily has a normal one about it.

entry.title: I Wear The Black
entry.summary:
Author: p1tufina

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,965Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 842

Summary: Love was not a matter of agreement, or even shared values. That is how it is with family: you can clash, and argue and fight, but no one else can. No one else has the right to. But even after a thousand disagreements and even more arguments, Bruce remained the man who raised them. The man who grew into the role of a father for every kid that had lived under this roof. So if this alternative Bruce had no Robins, one could at least hope there was someone else waiting for him. Someone who thought of him beyond just Batman. It was only fair, for no Bruce should ever be alone. Even if Bruce himself most often did not realize so. Bats are social creatures, after all. Or Absolute Batman lands in the Mainline universe and learns that maybe his mission doesn't need to be a lonely one.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I survived, but what for?
entry.summary:
Author: ThisIsNotTheWriterYouAreLookingFor

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,870Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 22

Summary: On that faithful day in Ethiopia Batman was not late to save Robin. Little did he guess that this would just be the start of a long journey full of misery and heart ache, that at the end, it all may have been worth it… But not so necessary.   a.k.a. Bruce saves Jason, but that forces him to come to the terms of his own demons, in order to help Jason with his. And Jason is recovering from the murder attempt, and has a terrible time in the meanwhile.

entry.title: We're gonna walk on water. There is no need to swim.
entry.summary:
Author: babbzz

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,440Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 874

Summary: Damian Al-Ghul does not get sick. He is the son of the Batman.Heir to the Demon’s Head.The future of the Bat mantle, the pride of his parents, the successor his brothers watch with wary admiration. He does not get sick. Not when he goes under in the Gotham harbor.Not when filthy water fills his lungs and drags him down.Not when he drags himself home, bruised and shaking.Not when the fever blooms behind his eyes the next morning. No.Because Damian Al-Ghul does not get sick.Sickness is weakness, and Damian Al-Ghul is never weak. …right? He's not sick. Not when the fever climbs, when breathing becomes a battle he can’t win alone, when the river’s infection sinks its teeth into his lungs and blood- No. He's fine. Damian Al-Ghul does not get sick. That would imply weakness. And he is an unstoppable, invincible, ten-year-old war assassin- …who maybe, possibly, hypothetically should not be coughing like that. Or swaying like that. Or unable to get up anymore. No. Because Damian Al-Ghul doesn’t get sick. (Except, apparently… Damian Wayne does. He absolutely does.)

entry.title: What If Bruce got Hit by Magic...
entry.summary:
Author: Rhythm_Of_The_Wind

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,764Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 330

Summary: ...And it projects his thoughts out loud like a reverse mind reading? Beware, for you're about to learn the intimate, unfiltered thoughts of the Dark Knight. Featuring: emotional damage, secondhand embarrassment, and Bruce Wayne having zero thoughts about himself.   Warning: 80% of Bruce’s brain is just “my babies :)”

  • no beta we die like men

entry.title: The Little Light in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: Stsrmoonlit

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,573Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 12

Summary: It's a story written about the Batman family and It's about Bruce Wayne adopting a child again with this child being different from the rest of his other adopted children and the entire Wayne family became overprotective of this child and so did their friends but this child has a secret and can she keep it from her new family or will they find out her secret and I've made my own character, hope you like this

entry.title: Don’t Start Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: disasterzoneix

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,833Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 58

Summary: “Dick,” the name barely leaves his throat. Bruce isn’t sure if it’s a plea or a prayer. There’s no answer to his name, no rustle of fabric. Nothing. Still Bruce waits. -- or: Dick is late for family dinner

entry.title: No Man's Land
entry.summary:
Author: NotCassia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,173Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 144

Summary: “Delegate of Gotham City!” The Chairman's façade of composure all but snapped into shards like frail glass. “Think through what you're about to—” “—Mr Wayne!—”“—over here!—”“—Mr Wayne!—”“—a brief comment—”“—any words—”“—your relationship with Batman!—”“—Mr Wayne!—” Bruce strode out the conference doors, all six bats in synchronised march. Without regard or even a cursory glance for those all but shrieking out his name. At his departure, some tried to follow, the rest turned their fangs and frenzy to Luthor. And he didn't have the bats at his side. He was fodder. The cameras cut just as the entire conference descended into pure chaos.   ....   Clark jolted in place as he felt a hand rest on his shoulder. Turning to look at the person it belonged to, John met his unmoored gaze with an apologetic one. “I'm sorry I ever doubted your boy toy.”

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 124,733Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 70

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore.   i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work
